---
title: "PREVENT-AD Family History"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

```{r setting}
library(ggpubr)
library(patchwork)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')

fhx_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, 
                             "PREVENTAD_fhx.rds"))
biomarkers <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, 
                                "PREVENTAD_biomarkers.rds"))
PREVENTAD_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_raw.rds"))

ptau217_last <- biomarkers %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ptau217)) %>%
  select(CONP_ID, Date_taken, age, ptau217) %>%
  slice_tail() %>%
  ungroup()

other_biomarkers_last <- biomarkers %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  select(CONP_ID, all_of(BIOMARKERS)) %>%
  select(-ptau217) %>%
  filter_at(vars(-CONP_ID), all_vars(!is.na(.))) %>%
  slice_tail() %>%
  ungroup()

lastvisit_bm <- ptau217_last %>% 
  select(CONP_ID, ptau217) %>%
  left_join(other_biomarkers_last, by = "CONP_ID") %>%
  mutate(
    # Add log transformations
    gfap_log = log(gfap),
    nfl_log = log(nfl),
    ptau181_log = log(ptau181),
    ptau217_log = log(ptau217),
    ptau217_ab42_ratio_log = log(ptau217_ab42_ratio)
  )
```

# Family history distributions

```{r fhx-viz}
hist1 <- ggplot(fhx_dat, aes(x=FDR_AD)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth=1) +
  labs(title = "First-degree Relatives with AD",
       x = "Number of First-degree Relatives with AD",
       y = "Count")

hist2 <- ggplot(fhx_dat, aes(x=other_family_members_AD)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth=1) +
  labs(title = "Extended Family with AD",
       x = "Number of Extended Family Members with AD",
       y = "Count")

# Combine histograms
fhx_hist <- hist1 + hist2 + plot_layout(axes="collect")
fhx_hist

# Crosstab heatmap
fhx_xtab <- fhx_dat %>%
  count(FDR_AD, other_family_members_AD) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = as.factor(other_family_members_AD), 
             y = as.factor(FDR_AD), 
             fill = n)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), size = 5, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "lightblue", high = "darkblue", name = "Count") +
  labs(
    title = "Family History Crosstabulation",
    x = "Number of Extended Relatives with AD",
    y = "Number of First-Degree Relatives with AD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
  )
fhx_xtab

# Row percentages (% within each FDR category)
fhx_crosstab <- fhx_dat %>%
  count(FDR_AD, other_family_members_AD) %>%
  arrange(FDR_AD, other_family_members_AD) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = other_family_members_AD, 
              values_from = n, 
              values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(Total = rowSums(across(where(is.numeric)))) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Family History Crosstabulation**"),
    subtitle = "First-Degree Relatives (FDR) vs Extended Relatives with AD"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    FDR_AD = "Number of FDR with AD"
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Number of Extended Relatives with AD",
    columns = -c(FDR_AD, Total)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightblue"),
    locations = cells_body(columns = Total)
  ) %>%
  grand_summary_rows(
    columns = where(is.numeric),
    fns = list(Total = ~sum(.)),
    fmt = ~ fmt_number(., decimals = 0)
  )
fhx_crosstab
# print(fhx_crosstab_pct)
```

# Number of first-degree relatives with AD associations with biomarker levels

```{r fdr-assoc}
# Baseline biomarkers: first non-NA observation per participant
baseline_ <- biomarkers %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ab_ratio)) %>%
  slice_head() %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(CONP_ID, all_of(BIOMARKERS)) %>%
  mutate(
    gfap_log               = log(gfap),
    nfl_log                = log(nfl),
    ptau181_log            = log(ptau181),
    ptau217_log            = log(ptau217),
    ptau217_ab42_ratio_log = log(ptau217_ab42_ratio)
  )

# Join FDR count with baseline biomarkers
fhx_bio <- fhx_dat %>%
  select(CONP_ID, other_family_members_AD) %>%
  inner_join(lastvisit_bm, by = "CONP_ID") %>%
  mutate(other_family_members_AD = as.factor(other_family_members_AD))

# Label mapping
bio_labels <- c(
  ab_ratio               = "A\u03b242/40 Ratio",
  gfap_log               = "GFAP (log)",
  nfl_log                = "NfL (log)",
  ptau181_log            = "p-tau181 (log)",
  ptau217_log            = "p-tau217 (log)",
  ptau217_ab42_ratio_log = "p-tau217/A\u03b242 (log)"
)

fhx_bio_long <- fhx_bio %>%
  select(CONP_ID, other_family_members_AD, all_of(BIOMARKERS_TRANS)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = all_of(BIOMARKERS_TRANS),
    names_to  = "biomarker",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(biomarker = factor(biomarker,
                            levels = names(bio_labels),
                            labels = bio_labels))

ggplot(fhx_bio_long, aes(x = other_family_members_AD, y = value)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~biomarker, scales = "free") +
  stat_compare_means(method = "kruskal.test",
                     label.x.npc = 0.05,
                     label.y.npc = 0.8,
                     geom = "label",
                     size = 4) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "plasma", begin = 0.2, end = 0.9) +
  labs(x = "Composite Risk Score",
       y = "Biomarker Level",
       title = "Figure 1. Blood-based Biomarker Levels by Composite Risk Score") +
  #theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.position = "none",
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
        strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"))
# cogdrisk_plot
```
